description: Two departments want to cross-list a course, making it available for credit to students in both majors.

nodes.task_description: Receive the course information and the two departments that will be sharing it (e.g., 'SOCI350' and 'ANTH350').

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the details of the cross-listing request.

nodes.task_description: Verify that both department chairs have approved the cross-listing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent checks the system for the required approvals.

nodes.task_description: Process the cross-listing in the SIS, linking the two course codes to the same class section.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully configures the course in the system.
